xslt_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--  **************************************************************
 Create Date:	26-SEPT-2022 	Created By:	Chitranjana
 Change Date:   20-NOV-2023     Changed By: Hamsha
 EDI Team	:	Solar EDI Team 
 Customers	:	EUROFIEL CONFECCIÓN,S.A.(SPF)(8429107009761
) and EUROFIEL CONFECCIÓN S.A. (CTF)(8429107000003)
 ************************************************************** -->
<xsl:stylesheet
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
	exclude-result-prefixes="#all" version="2.0">
	<xsl:output encoding="UTF-8" method="xml"/>
	
	<xsl:template match="/">
		<xsl:variable name="c1" select="/*" />
		<xsl:variable name="h" select="//S_UNB" />
		<xsl:variable name="sid" select="normalize-space($h/C_S002/D_0004)" />
		<xsl:variable name="c" select="//M_ORDERS" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPO" select="$c/S_BGM/D_1004" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPODate" select="$c/S_DTM/C_C507 [D_2005='137']/D_2380"  />
		<xsl:variable name="rdd" select = "if ($c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='64']/D_2380) then  $c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='64']/D_2380 else if ($c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='2']/D_2380) then $c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='2']/D_2380 else ''"/> 
		<xsl:variable name="cdd" select="$c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='63']/D_2380"/>
		<xsl:variable name="LOC_D_3225" select="($c/G_SG25[1]/G_SG33/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225)" />
		<xsl:variable name="multiLOC" select="if($c/G_SG25/G_SG33/S_LOC/C_C517[D_3225 != $LOC_D_3225]) then 'YES' else 'NO'"/>
		<xsl:variable name="createMF" select="if ($multiLOC ='NO') then if($LOC_D_3225 != '') then $LOC_D_3225 else if($c/G_SG12/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225 != '') then $c/G_SG12/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225 else 'NO' else 'NO'"/>
		<!-- <xsl:variable name = "multiLOC">
  		 <xsl:choose> 
    		 <xsl:when test="''"/> 
  		  <xsl:otherwise>
        	<xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999])'>
        				<xsl:variable name="posnrrow" select="position()" />
        				<xsl:variable name = "first" select="$c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[1]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
        					<xsl:for-each select="(($c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33)[position() <= 999])">
        					  <xsl:variable name="posnrcol" select="position()" />
        					  <xsl:if test="compare($first, $c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[$posnrcol]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225) != 0" >
        					     <xsl:value-of select="'true'"/>
        					  </xsl:if>
        		      </xsl:for-each>
        		</xsl:for-each>
  		  </xsl:otherwise>
      </xsl:choose>
    </xsl:variable> -->
    <xsl:variable name="havemultLoc" select="substring ($multiLOC , 1, 4 ) = 'true'"/>
	
		
		<FSHORD03>
			<IDOC BEGIN="1">
				<EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
					<TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
					<MANDT></MANDT>
					<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
					<IDOCTYP>FSHORD03</IDOCTYP>
					<CIMTYP />
					<MESTYP>ORDERS</MESTYP>
					<MESCOD>333</MESCOD>
					<MESFCT />
					<STD>E</STD>
					<STDVRS></STDVRS>
					<STDMES></STDMES>
					<SNDPOR>SAPCPI</SNDPOR>
					<SNDPRT>KU</SNDPRT>
					<SNDPFC />
					<SNDSAD />
					<SNDLAD></SNDLAD>
					<SNDPRN>
						<xsl:value-of select="$sid" />
					</SNDPRN>
					<RCVPOR>SAPS4H</RCVPOR>
					<RCVPRT>LS</RCVPRT>
					<RCVPFC />
					<RCVPRN>SG1CLNT511</RCVPRN>
					<RCVSAD />
					<RCVLAD></RCVLAD>
					<CREDAT></CREDAT>
					<REFINT></REFINT>
					<REFGRP></REFGRP>
					<REFMES></REFMES>
					<ARCKEY></ARCKEY>
					<SERIAL></SERIAL>
				</EDI_DC40>
				<!--started -->
				<E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1">
					<ACTION>001</ACTION>
					<EMPST></EMPST>
					<AUGRU>BRFVAL</AUGRU>
				</E1EDK01>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>012</QUALF>
					<ORGID>BRF</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>019</QUALF>
					<ORGID>EDI</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK03 SEGMENT="1">
					<IDDAT>002</IDDAT>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$rdd" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK03>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>AG</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
					  <xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='BY']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
						<xsl:value-of
							select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='DP']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>RE</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
						<xsl:value-of
							select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='IV']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>
				<!-- Create MF-->
			
					<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
						<PARVW>MF</PARVW>
						  <LIFNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='UC']/C_C082/D_3039"/>
						  </LIFNR>
					</E1EDKA1>
		
				<!-- Complete MF-->
				
				<E1EDK02 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<BELNR>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPO" />
					</BELNR>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPODate" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK02>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>002</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				<!-- Need to Check -->
				<!-- OPTIONAL-Supplier Number customer sent -->
				<!-- <xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG2/S_NAD)[position() <= 999999])'>
				  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
				  <E1EDKT1 SEGMENT="1">
  					<TDID>ZH01</TDID>
  					<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
  					<E1EDKT2 SEGMENT="1">
  						<TDLINE>
  							<xsl:value-of 
  							  select="if ($c/C_C082/D_3039 != '') then (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3039,';')) else (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3036,';'))"/>
  						</TDLINE>
  						<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
  					</E1EDKT2>
				  </E1EDKT1>
				</xsl:for-each> -->
	
				<!-- For each EDI ITEM -->
				<xsl:for-each
					select="(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999999])">
					<xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
					<E1EDP01 SEGMENT="1">
						<POSEX>
						 <xsl:value-of select="if ($c/S_LIN/D_1082 != '') then $c/S_LIN/D_1082 else $posnr"/> 
						</POSEX>
						<ACTION>001</ACTION>
						<MENGE>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
						</MENGE>
						<MENEE>EA</MENEE>
						<VPREI>
							<xsl:value-of
								select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125 = 'AAA']/D_5118" />
						</VPREI>
						<PEINH>1</PEINH>
						<xsl:variable name="currency" select="$c/G_SG28/S_CUX/C_C504/D_6345"/>
						<CURCY><xsl:value-of select="$currency"/></CURCY>
						<MATNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140" />
						</MATNR>
						
	           <!-- OPTIONAL if Customer sending MSRP/CTP -->
					 <xsl:if test="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509/D_5125 = 'AAB'">
  						<E1EDP05 SEGMENT="1">
  							<ALCKZ>+</ALCKZ>
  							<KSCHL>ZEDR</KSCHL>
  							<KRATE>
  								<xsl:value-of
  									select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125 = 'AAB']/D_5118" />
  							</KRATE>
  							<UPRBS>1</UPRBS>
  						</E1EDP05>
						</xsl:if>
						
						<E1EDP20 SEGMENT="1">
							<WMENG>
								<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
							</WMENG>
						</E1EDP20>
						
						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>001</QUALF>
							<IDTNR><xsl:value-of select="$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='SA']/D_7140"/></IDTNR>
						</E1EDP19>
						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>002</QUALF>
							<IDTNR>BRFTEXT</IDTNR>
							<KTEXT>BRFTEXT</KTEXT>
						</E1EDP19>
						
						<E1EDPT1 SEGMENT="1">
							<TDID>ZI01</TDID>
							<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
							<E1EDPT2 SEGMENT="1">
								<TDLINE></TDLINE>
								<TDFORMAT><xsl:value-of 
  							  select="concat($c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140,'/',$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='IN']/D_7140,'/',$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='SA']/D_7140,'/',$c/S_IMD[D_7077='F']/C_C273/D_7008)"/></TDFORMAT>
							</E1EDPT2>
						</E1EDPT1>
						
					  <!-- Logic for multiple LOC -->
					  <xsl:if test="$multiLOC = 'YES'" >
						<xsl:for-each select="$c/G_SG33">
						  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>
						</xsl:for-each>
						</xsl:if>
						<!-- end for loop -->
					</E1EDP01>
				</xsl:for-each>
				<E1EDS01 SEGMENT="1">
                    <SUMID>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='2']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMID>
                    <SUMME>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='1']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMME>
                </E1EDS01>
				<E1EDK37 SEGMENT="1"> 
				  <FSH_CANDATE> <xsl:value-of select="$cdd"/> </FSH_CANDATE> 
				</E1EDK37>		
			</IDOC>
		</FSHORD03>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--  *******************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
 Create Date:	11-OCT-2023 	Created By:	Hamsha
 Change Date:   20-NOV-2023     Changed By: Hamsha
 EDI Team	:	Solar EDI Team
 Customers	:	EL CORTE INGLES GRANDES ARMAZENS, S (10050404), EL CORTE INGLES S.A. (10050403), El Corte Ingles  S.A. (10020657), EL CORTE INGLES GRANDES ARMAZENS S.(10020289)
 *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** -->
<xsl:stylesheet
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
	xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"
	exclude-result-prefixes="#all" version="2.0">
	<xsl:output encoding="UTF-8" method="xml" indent = "yes" />

	<xsl:template match="/">
		<xsl:variable name="c1" select="/*" />
		<xsl:variable name="h" select="//S_UNB" />
		<xsl:variable name="sid" select="normalize-space($h/C_S002/D_0004)" />
		<xsl:variable name="c" select="//M_ORDERS" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPO" select="$c/S_BGM/D_1004" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPODate" select="$c/S_DTM/C_C507 [D_2005='137']/D_2380"  />
		<xsl:variable name="rdd" select = "$c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='2']/D_2380"/>
		<xsl:variable name="cdd" select="$c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='63']/D_2380"/>

		<xsl:variable name = "multiLOC">
  		 <xsl:choose>
    		 <xsl:when test="''"/>
  		  <xsl:otherwise>
        	<xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999])'>
        				<xsl:variable name="posnrrow" select="position()" />
        				<xsl:variable name = "first" select="$c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[1]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
        					<xsl:for-each select="(($c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33)[position() <= 999])">
        					  <xsl:variable name="posnrcol" select="position()" />
        					  <xsl:if test="compare($first, $c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[$posnrcol]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225) != 0" >
        					     <xsl:value-of select="'true'"/>
        					  </xsl:if>
        		      </xsl:for-each>
        		</xsl:for-each>
  		  </xsl:otherwise>
      </xsl:choose>
    </xsl:variable>
    <xsl:variable name="havemultLoc" select="substring ($multiLOC , 1, 4 ) = 'true' "/>
	<xsl:variable name="currency" select="$c/G_SG7/S_CUX/C_C504/D_6345"/>

		<FSHORD03>
			<IDOC BEGIN="1">
				<EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
					<TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
					<MANDT></MANDT>
					<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
					<IDOCTYP>FSHORD03</IDOCTYP>
					<CIMTYP />
					<MESTYP>ORDERS</MESTYP>
					<MESCOD>333</MESCOD>
					<MESFCT />
					<STD>X</STD>
					<STDVRS>D96A</STDVRS>
					<STDMES>ORDERS</STDMES>
					<SNDPOR>SAPCPI</SNDPOR>
					<SNDPRT>KU</SNDPRT>
					<SNDPFC />
					<SNDSAD />
					<SNDLAD></SNDLAD>
					<SNDPRN>
						<xsl:value-of select="$sid" />
					</SNDPRN>
					<RCVPOR>SAPS4H</RCVPOR>
					<RCVPRT>LS</RCVPRT>
					<RCVPFC />
					<RCVPRN>SG1CLNT511</RCVPRN>
					<RCVSAD />
					<RCVLAD></RCVLAD>
					<CREDAT></CREDAT>
					<REFINT></REFINT>
					<REFGRP></REFGRP>
					<REFMES></REFMES>
					<ARCKEY></ARCKEY>
					<SERIAL></SERIAL>
				</EDI_DC40>
				<!--started -->
				<E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1">
					<ACTION>001</ACTION>
					<EMPST><xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/G_SG3/S_RFF/C_C506[D_1153='API']/D_1154"/></EMPST><!-- Department Code -->
					<AUGRU>BRFVAL</AUGRU>
				</E1EDK01>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>012</QUALF>
					<ORGID>BRF</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>019</QUALF>
					<ORGID>EDI</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK03 SEGMENT="1">
					<IDDAT>002</IDDAT>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$rdd" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK03>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>AG</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
					  <xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='BY']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
						<xsl:value-of
							select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='DP']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>

				<!-- Create MF-->
					<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
						<PARVW>MF</PARVW>
						  <LIFNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='BY']/C_C082/D_3039" />
						  </LIFNR>
					</E1EDKA1>
				<!-- Complete MF-->

				<E1EDK02 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<BELNR>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPO" />
					</BELNR>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPODate" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK02>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>002</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				<!-- Need to check -->
				<!-- OPTIONAL-Supplier Number customer sent -->
				<!-- <xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG2/S_NAD)[position() <= 999999])'>
				  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
				  <E1EDKT1 SEGMENT="1">
  					<TDID>ZH01</TDID>
  					<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
  					<E1EDKT2 SEGMENT="1">
  						<TDLINE>
  							<xsl:value-of
  							  select="if ($c/C_C082/D_3039 != '') then (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3039,';')) else (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3036,';'))"/>
  						</TDLINE>
  						<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
  					</E1EDKT2>
				  </E1EDKT1>
				</xsl:for-each> -->
				<!-- Need to check -->
				<!-- FTX if the D_4440 != ''-->
				<!-- <xsl:for-each select='(($c/S_FTX)[position() <= 999999])'>
				  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
						<xsl:if test="$c/C_C108/D_4440 != ''">
  				  <E1EDKT1 SEGMENT="1">
    					<TDID>ZH02</TDID>
    					<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
    					<E1EDKT2 SEGMENT="1">
    						<TDLINE>
    							<xsl:value-of
    							  select="$c/C_C108/D_4440 "/>
    						</TDLINE>
    						<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
    					</E1EDKT2>
  				  </E1EDKT1>
  				</xsl:if>
				</xsl:for-each> -->

				<!-- For each EDI ITEM -->
				<xsl:for-each
					select="(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999999])">
					<xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
					<E1EDP01 SEGMENT="1">
						<POSEX>
						 <xsl:value-of select="if ($c/S_LIN/D_1082 != '') then $c/S_LIN/D_1082 else $posnr"/>
						</POSEX>
						<ACTION>001</ACTION>
						<MENGE>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
						</MENGE>
						<MENEE>EA</MENEE>
						<VPREI>
							<xsl:value-of
								select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125 = 'AAA']/D_5118" />
						</VPREI>
						<PEINH>1</PEINH>
						<CURCY><xsl:value-of select="$currency"/></CURCY>
						<MATNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140" />
						</MATNR>

				<!-- Need to chek  if to be mapped when PRI+AAA and PRI+AAB is same-->
			  <!-- OPTIONAL if Customer sending MSRP/CTP --> 
						<xsl:if test="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509/D_5125 = 'AAB'">
  						<E1EDP05 SEGMENT="1">
  							<ALCKZ>+</ALCKZ>
  							<KSCHL>ZEDR</KSCHL>
  							<KRATE>
  								<xsl:value-of
  									select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125 = 'AAB']/D_5118" />
  							</KRATE>
  							<UPRBS>1</UPRBS>
  						</E1EDP05>
						</xsl:if>

						<E1EDP20 SEGMENT="1">
							<WMENG>
								<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
							</WMENG>
						</E1EDP20>

						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>001</QUALF>
							<IDTNR><xsl:value-of select="$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='IN']/D_7140"/></IDTNR><!-- Need to check -->
						</E1EDP19>
						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>002</QUALF>
							<IDTNR>BRFTEXT</IDTNR>
							<KTEXT>BRFTEXT</KTEXT>
						</E1EDP19>
						<E1EDPT1 SEGMENT="1">
							<TDID>ZI01</TDID>
							<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
							<E1EDPT2 SEGMENT="1">
								<TDLINE>
								  <xsl:value-of select="concat($c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140,'/',$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='IN']/D_7140,'/',$c/S_IMD[D_7081='DSC']/C_C273/D_7008,' ',$c/S_IMD[D_7081='DSC']/C_C273/D_7008_2)"/>
								</TDLINE>
								<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
							</E1EDPT2>
						</E1EDPT1>
					  <!-- Logic for multiple LOC -->
					  <xsl:if test="$havemultLoc" >
						<xsl:for-each select="$c/G_SG33">
						  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>

						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C519/D_3223 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C519/D_3223" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>

						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C553/D_3233 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C553/D_3233" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>
						</xsl:for-each>
						</xsl:if>
						<!-- end for loop -->
					</E1EDP01>
				</xsl:for-each>
				<E1EDS01 SEGMENT="1">
                    <SUMID>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='2']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMID>
                    <SUMME>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='1']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMME>
                </E1EDS01>
				<E1EDK37 SEGMENT="1">
				  <FSH_CANDATE> <xsl:value-of select="$cdd"/> </FSH_CANDATE>
				</E1EDK37>

			</IDOC>
		</FSHORD03>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--  **************************************************************
 Create Date:	27-NOV-2023 	Created By:	Hamsha
 EDI Team	:	Solar EDI Team
 Customers	:	Inno(4332243000001)
 ************************************************************** -->
<xsl:stylesheet
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
	xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"
	exclude-result-prefixes="#all" version="2.0">
	<xsl:output encoding="UTF-8" method="xml"/>

	<xsl:template match="/">
		<xsl:variable name="c1" select="/*" />
		<xsl:variable name="h" select="//S_UNB" />
		<xsl:variable name="sid" select="normalize-space($h/C_S002/D_0004)" />
		<xsl:variable name="c" select="//M_ORDERS" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPO" select="$c/S_BGM/D_1004" />
		<xsl:variable name="custmerPODate" select="$c/S_DTM/C_C507 [D_2005='137']/D_2380"  />
		<xsl:variable name="rdd" select = "if($c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='2']/D_2380) then $c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='2']/D_2380 else $c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='64']/D_2380"/>
		<xsl:variable name="cdd" select = "$c/S_DTM/C_C507[D_2005='63']/D_2380"/>
		<xsl:variable name="currency" select="$c/G_SG7/S_CUX/C_C504/D_6345"/>
		<xsl:variable name = "multiLOC">
  		 <xsl:choose>
    		 <xsl:when test="''"/>
  		  <xsl:otherwise>
        	<xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999])'>
        				<xsl:variable name="posnrrow" select="position()" />
        				<xsl:variable name = "first" select="$c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[1]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
        					<xsl:for-each select="(($c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33)[position() <= 999])">
        					  <xsl:variable name="posnrcol" select="position()" />
        					  <xsl:if test="compare($first, $c/G_SG25[$posnrrow]/G_SG33[$posnrcol]/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225) != 0" >
        					     <xsl:value-of select="'true'"/>
        					  </xsl:if>
        		      </xsl:for-each>
        		</xsl:for-each>
  		  </xsl:otherwise>
      </xsl:choose>
    </xsl:variable>
    <xsl:variable name="havemultLoc" select="substring ($multiLOC , 1, 4 ) = 'true' "/>

		<FSHORD03>
			<IDOC BEGIN="1">
				<EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
					<TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
					<MANDT></MANDT>
					<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
					<IDOCTYP>FSHORD03</IDOCTYP>
					<CIMTYP />
					<MESTYP>ORDERS</MESTYP>
					<MESCOD>333</MESCOD>
					<MESFCT />
					<STD>E</STD>
					<STDVRS>D96A</STDVRS>
					<STDMES>ORDERS</STDMES>
					<SNDPOR>SAPCPI</SNDPOR>
					<SNDPRT>KU</SNDPRT>
					<SNDPFC />
					<SNDSAD />
					<SNDLAD></SNDLAD>
					<SNDPRN>
						<xsl:value-of select="$sid" />
					</SNDPRN>
					<RCVPOR>SAPS4H</RCVPOR>
					<RCVPRT>LS</RCVPRT>
					<RCVPFC />
					<RCVPRN>SG1CLNT511</RCVPRN>
					<RCVSAD />
					<RCVLAD></RCVLAD>
					<CREDAT></CREDAT>
					<REFINT></REFINT>
					<REFGRP></REFGRP>
					<REFMES></REFMES>
					<ARCKEY></ARCKEY>
					<SERIAL></SERIAL>
				</EDI_DC40>
				<!--started -->
				<E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1">
					<ACTION>001</ACTION>
					<EMPST><xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/G_SG5/S_CTA[D_3139='PD']/C_C056/D_3413"/></EMPST>
					<AUGRU>BRFVAL</AUGRU>
				</E1EDK01>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>012</QUALF>
					<ORGID>BRF</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>019</QUALF>
					<ORGID>EDI</ORGID>
				</E1EDK14>
				<E1EDK03 SEGMENT="1">
					<IDDAT>002</IDDAT>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$rdd" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK03>
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>AG</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
					  <xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='BY']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>
				<!-- NAD+BY is mapped in SI map for E1EDKA1 WE -->
				<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
					<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
					<LIFNR>
						<xsl:value-of
							select="$c/G_SG2/S_NAD[D_3035='DP']/C_C082/D_3039" />
					</LIFNR>
				</E1EDKA1>

				<!-- Create MF-->
				<xsl:if test= "$c/G_SG11/S_LOC">
					<E1EDKA1 SEGMENT="1">
						<PARVW>MF</PARVW>
						  <LIFNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG11/S_LOC/C_C519/D_3225"/>
						  </LIFNR>
					</E1EDKA1>
				</xsl:if>
				<!-- Complete MF-->

				<E1EDK02 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<BELNR>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPO" />
					</BELNR>
					<DATUM>
						<xsl:value-of select="$custmerPODate" />
					</DATUM>
				</E1EDK02>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>001</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				<E1EDK17 SEGMENT="1">
					<QUALF>002</QUALF>
					<LKOND></LKOND>
					<LKTEXT>BRF</LKTEXT>
				</E1EDK17>
				
				<E1EDKT1 SEGMENT="1">
  					<TDID>ZM01</TDID>
  					<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
					<xsl:for-each select='(($c/G_SG2/S_NAD)[position() <= 999999])'>
					<xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
  					<E1EDKT2 SEGMENT="1">
  						<TDLINE>
  							<xsl:value-of
  							  select="if ($c/C_C082/D_3039 != '') then (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3039,';')) else (concat($c/D_3035,':',$c/C_C082/D_3036,';'))"/>
  						</TDLINE>
  						<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
  					</E1EDKT2>
					</xsl:for-each>
				  </E1EDKT1>

				<!-- For each EDI ITEM -->
				<xsl:for-each
					select="(($c/G_SG25)[position() <= 999999])">
					<xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
					<xsl:variable name="posnr" select="position()" />
					<E1EDP01 SEGMENT="1">
						<POSEX>
						 <xsl:value-of select="if ($c/S_LIN/D_1082 != '') then $c/S_LIN/D_1082 else $posnr"/>
						</POSEX>
						<ACTION>001</ACTION>
						<MENGE>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
						</MENGE>
						<MENEE>EA</MENEE>
						<VPREI><xsl:value-of select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125='AAA']/D_5118"/></VPREI> <!-- Need to check-->
						<PEINH>1</PEINH>
						<CURCY>
						    <xsl:value-of select="$currency" />
						</CURCY>
						<MATNR>
							<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140" />
						</MATNR>

	          <!-- OPTIONAL if Customer sending MSRP/CTP -->
						<!-- <xsl:if test="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509/D_5125 = 'AAB' or $c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509/D_5125 = 'AAE' ">
  						<E1EDP05 SEGMENT="1">
  							<ALCKZ>+</ALCKZ>
  							<KSCHL>ZEDR</KSCHL>
  							<KRATE>
  								<xsl:value-of
  									select="$c/G_SG28/S_PRI/C_C509[D_5125 = 'AAE' or D_5125 = 'AAB']/D_5118" />
  							</KRATE>
  							<UPRBS>1</UPRBS>
  						</E1EDP05>
						</xsl:if> -->

						<E1EDP20 SEGMENT="1">
							<WMENG>
								<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_QTY/C_C186[D_6063 = '21']/D_6060" />
							</WMENG>
						</E1EDP20>

						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>001</QUALF>
							<IDTNR></IDTNR>
						</E1EDP19>
						<E1EDP19 SEGMENT="1">
							<QUALF>002</QUALF>
							<IDTNR>BRFTEXT</IDTNR>
							<KTEXT>BRFTEXT</KTEXT>
						</E1EDP19>

						<E1EDPT1 SEGMENT="1">
							<TDID>ZI01</TDID>
							<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
							<E1EDPT2 SEGMENT="1">
								<TDLINE><xsl:value-of select="concat($c/S_LIN/C_C212/D_7140,'/',$c/S_PIA/C_C212[D_7143='SA']/D_7140)"/></TDLINE>
								<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
							</E1EDPT2>
						</E1EDPT1>
						
						<E1EDPT1 SEGMENT="1">
							<TDID>ZPSX</TDID>
							<TSSPRAS>EN</TSSPRAS>
							<E1EDPT2 SEGMENT="1">
								<TDLINE>
									<xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LIN/D_1082"/>
								</TDLINE>
								<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
							</E1EDPT2>
						</E1EDPT1>

					  <!-- Logic for multiple LOC -->
					  <xsl:if test="$havemultLoc" >
						<xsl:for-each select="$c/G_SG33">
						  <xsl:variable name="c" select="." />
						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C517/D_3225" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>

						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C519/D_3223 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C519/D_3223" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>

						  <xsl:if test = "$c/S_LOC/C_C553/D_3233 != ''">
							<E1EDP34 SEGMENT="1">
								<ACTION>001</ACTION>
								<PARTNER_INDICATOR>M</PARTNER_INDICATOR>
								<EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								  <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_LOC/C_C553/D_3233" />
								</EXTERNAL_PARTNER>
								<ORDER_QUANTITY>
								  <xsl:value-of select="($c/S_QTY/C_C186/D_6060)" />
							   </ORDER_QUANTITY>
							</E1EDP34>
						  </xsl:if>
						</xsl:for-each>
						</xsl:if>
						<!-- end for loop -->
					</E1EDP01>
				</xsl:for-each>
				
				<E1EDS01 SEGMENT="1">
                    <SUMID>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='2']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMID>
                    <SUMME>
                        <xsl:value-of select="$c/S_CNT/C_C270[D_6069='1']/D_6066" />
                    </SUMME>
                </E1EDS01>
				
				<E1EDK37 SEGMENT="1">
				  <FSH_CANDATE><xsl:value-of select="$cdd"/></FSH_CANDATE>
				</E1EDK37>

			</IDOC>
		</FSHORD03>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>
